example: 3 mistakes new investors make that cost them everything.
improved_version: 3 investing mistakes that quietly kill your returns.

example: Stop posting every day. It's killing your account.
bad_version: Posting frequency is important to consider.
improved_version: Stop posting every day. Here's the data.

formula: [Common belief] is [wrong/lie/keeping you poor]. Here's the truth.
example: Saving money is keeping you poor. Here's why.
improved_version: Saving money is not the answer. This is.
use_case: finance, business, health, or mindset clips with counterintuitive takes

formula: Nobody tells you [uncomfortable truth about desired thing].
example: Nobody tells you that entrepreneurship is the loneliest thing you'll ever do.
improved_version: Nobody talks about how lonely it gets at the top.

formula: From [state A] to [state B] — here's what changed.
example: From $30k in debt to $200k saved in 4 years. Here's what I changed.
bad_version: I improved my finances over time.
improved_version: $30k debt → $200k saved. One decision made the difference.

example: Watch until the last 5 seconds — you won't believe what he says.
bad_version: There's something interesting at the end.
improved_version: Do NOT skip the last 10 seconds of this.
use_case: clips with a strong late payoff or surprise ending

formula: [Impressive number/result] — and I'm going to show you exactly how.
example: 50,000 students paid $997 for this. I'm giving it away free.
bad_version: I've helped a lot of people.
improved_version: 50,000 people used this system. Here's the free version.
use_case: coaching, business, education clips with demonstrated scale

example: One book changed how I think about money forever.
improved_version: One book. Completely rewired how I handle money.

formula: I tested [debated thing] for [timeframe]. Here's what actually happened.
example: I tested posting 3x/day on TikTok for 30 days. The results surprised me.
improved_version: I posted 3x/day for 30 days. Here's what actually happened.
use_case: experiment-style content, creator growth, fitness, finance

example: In 30 seconds: how compound interest actually works.
improved_version: 30 seconds. Compound interest. You'll use this forever.

formula: The [dollar amount] mistake I made so you don't have to.
example: The $50,000 mistake I made in my first business.
bad_version: I made some business mistakes early on.
improved_version: $50k gone. Here's exactly what went wrong.

example: The hidden signal in job descriptions that tells you if the company is toxic.
improved_version: One line in every job description tells you everything about the company culture.
use_case: insider knowledge, professional insight, business intelligence
